goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'north' and should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
The hotel should 'include free parking'.
Make sure you get 'phone number', 'star of the hotel', and 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be 'in the same area as the hotel' and should be in the 'expensive' price range.
The restaurant should serve 'lebanese' food.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'chinese' food.
Make sure you get 'phone number', 'address', and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the north and should be in the type of guesthouse
The hotel should include free parking
Make sure you get phone number, star of the hotel, and postcode
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the same area as the hotel and should be in the expensive price range
The restaurant should serve lebanese food
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves chinese food
Make sure you get phone number, address, and postcode
